text: POL-index - the Polish citation index - is currently being built in the Centre for Open Science of the Interdisciplinary Centre for Mathematical and Computational Modelling (ICM), University of Warsaw. Its development is a consequence of a 2012 evaluation of humanities and social sciences journals listed in the so-called "list B", implemented by the Polish Ministry of Science and Higher Education. The core elements of the system are currently under preparation and will be made available in the near future. Due to its design, the system will have the flexibility to gather data from a variety of possible sources. Ideally, it is planned to work closely with existing Polish bibliographic databases. This would reduce the burden on journal representatives to the minimum. It is planned that the Polish Impact Coefficient (PIC) calculated within the POL-index system will be utilised in the evaluation of journals listed in 2014 in the "list B".
headline: Fully Human Written
